title: a canvas for your notes
excerpt: remember to water the plant. it's been a week. maybe two.
content_html:
remember to water the plant. it's been a week. maybe two.

what if the whole onboarding was just one note?

idea → bridge the two canvases. SKETCH THIS before i forget

groceries: oat milk, lemons, more sticky notes (ironic)

less is more. drag me around :)

a canvas for your notes.

Passinote.

Stack them, zone them, export them. Passinote is the desk that never runs out of room and never loses your place.

A desk that bends to how you think.

Four small things that add up to a canvas you'll actually keep open.

01 / DROP

Drop anything, anywhere

Notes, documents, labels — place them wherever your brain wants them. No grid, no folders, no rules.

02 / STACK

Stack & group

Pile related thoughts into a stack. Fan them out when you need them, collapse them when you don't.

03 / ZONES

Draw a zone

Sketch a region, drag notes inside, name it. Instant structure without ever leaving the canvas.

04 / EXPORT

Export to PDF

Select a note, a stack, or a whole zone and ship it as a clean PDF. What's on your desk leaves your desk.

Every note saved the instant you let go. No save button, ever.

AUTOSAVE

HISTORY

LIVE

也许是两个。

帕西诺特。

sentences.en: A desk that bends to how you think.

sentences.zh: 四件小事加起来构成了一张画布，您实际上可以保持打开状态。

blocks.html_en: Notes, documents, labels — place them wherever your brain wants them. No grid, no folders, no rules.

sentences.en: Notes, documents, labels — place them wherever your brain wants them.
sentences.zh: 笔记、文档、标签——将它们放在您的大脑想要的任何地方。

blocks.html_en: Pile related thoughts into a stack. Fan them out when you need them, collapse them when you don't.

sentences.en: Pile related thoughts into a stack.
sentences.zh: 将相关的想法堆成一个堆栈。

sentences.en: Fan them out when you need them, collapse them when you don't.
sentences.zh: 当你需要它们时将它们展开，当你不需要时将它们折叠起来。

blocks.html_en: Sketch a region, drag notes inside, name it. Instant structure without ever leaving the canvas.

sentences.en: Sketch a region, drag notes inside, name it.
sentences.zh: 绘制一个区域，将注释拖入其中，为其命名。

sentences.en: Instant structure without ever leaving the canvas.
sentences.zh: 无需离开画布即可即时构建。
04 / 出口
导出为 PDF

blocks.html_en: Select a note, a stack, or a whole zone and ship it as a clean PDF. What's on your desk leaves your desk.

sentences.zh: 选择一个笔记、一个堆栈或整个区域，并将其作为干净的 PDF 发送。

sentences.en: What's on your desk leaves your desk.
sentences.zh: 你桌上的东西会离开你的桌子。

历史

content_html_zh:
记得给植物浇水。 已经一周了。 也许是两个。

如果整个入职过程只是一张纸条怎么办？

想法→连接两个画布。 在我忘记之前画出这个草图

杂货：燕麦奶、柠檬、更多便利贴（讽刺）

少即是多。 拖着我到处走:)

你的笔记画布。

帕西诺特。

堆叠它们、分区它们、导出它们。 Passinote 是一张永远不会耗尽空间、永远不会失去位置的办公桌。

一张可以根据你的想法弯曲的桌子。

四件小事加起来构成了一张画布，您实际上可以保持打开状态。

01 / DROP

随处丢下任何东西

笔记、文档、标签——将它们放在您的大脑想要的任何地方。 没有网格，没有文件夹，没有规则。

02 / STACK

堆栈和分组

将相关的想法堆成一个堆栈。 当你需要它们时将它们展开，当你不需要时将它们折叠起来。

03 / ZONES

绘制一个区域

绘制一个区域，将注释拖入其中，为其命名。 无需离开画布即可即时构建。

04 / 出口

导出为 PDF

选择一个笔记、一个堆栈或整个区域，并将其作为干净的 PDF 发送。 你桌上的东西会离开你的桌子。

每一个音符在你放开的那一刻就被保存下来。 永远没有保存按钮。

自动保存

历史

LIVE
